description: Milo UADP encode-direction computed vector: Sign, PubSub-Aes128-CTR, 2-writer worked layout (PublisherId UInt16, full GroupHeader, 2-DataSetMessage PayloadHeader, Timestamp)
source: Exported from UadpSecurityGoldenVectorTest (Milo encoder with injected fixed MessageNonce + sequential key data 00 01 02 ..); UadpSecurityVectorFixturesTest pins fixture == encoder output
notes: SecurityHeader at offset 28, payload region [42, 62), HMAC-SHA256 signature over [0, 62) in the trailing 32 bytes. Sign-only carries the real token id and the 8-byte MessageNonce (Annex A form, K4). The Sizes array at [42, 46) is inside the encrypted region (Table 161).
